channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tensions rise as Iran releases footage of US aircraft and Trump signals potential deal
item.description: On Monday, April 6, 2026, tensions in the Middle East escalated as US President Donald Trump issued a strongly worded threat to Iran, demanding the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz by Tuesday night (...

item.title: Leeds defeat West Ham on penalties to reach FA Cup semi-finals
item.description: Leeds United have progressed to the FA Cup semi-finals after a dramatic victory against West Ham United at the London Stadium. The match ended 2–2 after extra time, with Leeds ultimately triumphing 4–...

item.title: Repatriation of Overseas Filipinos Amid Middle East Conflict
item.description: As the ongoing conflict in the Middle East intensifies, the Philippines continues its efforts to bring home its citizens from affected regions. On the evening of April 4, 2026, a group of sixty-seven ...

item.title: South African rugby sides look to redeem themselves in the URC after Champions Cup setbacks
item.description: South African rugby teams suffered another disappointing outing in the Champions Cup, raising fresh doubts about their competitiveness in Europe. Both the Bulls and Stormers were knocked out in the Ro...

item.title: Jim Naughten's Biophilia: AI-Generated Animal Art Connecting Humanity with Nature
item.description: Jim Naughten’s project, 'Biophilia', merges art and technology to explore humanity's relationship with the natural world. Using AI, Naughten creates fantastical, fictional animals rendered in ethereal...

item.title: Police probe threat letter sent with bullet to Karachi judge
item.description: Police authorities in Karachi have initiated an investigation after a civil judge, who previously served in an Anti-Terrorism Court (ATC), received a death threat in the form of a note accompanied by ...

item.title: Luiza Paschal: Leadership and Impact in Treasury Management at Access Bank Tanzania
item.description: Luiza Paschal is currently Head of Treasury at Access Bank Tanzania, where she leads liquidity management, foreign exchange operations, and funding strategies. Her journey in finance began with her st...

item.title: Kenya National Drama and Film Festival 2026 to Kick Off in Nyeri with New Rules and Digital Focus
item.description: The 2026 Kenya National Drama and Film Festival is fully prepared to take place at Kagumo Teachers Training College in Nyeri County from April 6 to 17. Teams from pre-school, primary, junior secondary...

item.title: Congo to receive some migrants deported from the US under temporary arrangement
item.description: The government of the Democratic Republic of Congo announced that it will accept a number of migrants deported from the United States as part of a new third-country deportation programme established d...

item.title: NDPC Investigates Possible Data Breach Involving Remita and Sterling Bank
item.description: The Nigeria Data Protection Commission (NDPC) don start official investigation wey dem launch on April 1, 2026, to check how personal and financial data of many Nigerians fit don leak through digital ...

item.title: Governor Mbah Signs SUMAS Teaching Hospital Bill into Law
item.description: Governor Peter Mbah don sign bill to establish teaching hospital for State University of Medical and Applied Sciences (SUMAS) for Igbo-Eno, Enugu State. Na dis action e show say e dey committed to con...

item.title: RIVCHPP Urges More Public Awareness to Improve Health Insurance Enrollment in Rivers State
item.description: The Rivers State Contributory Health Protection Programme (RIVCHPP) don dey worry say people for di state still no sabi well about di government health insurance scheme wey suppose help dem access bet...

item.title: Ransomware attack forces Land Bank to delay corporate plan submission to Parliament
item.description: Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana informed Parliament that the Land Bank has been unable to submit its 2026/27 corporate plan due to a ransomware attack that crippled its information technology system...

item.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid Escalating U.S.-Iran Tensions After Trump’s Statements
item.description: Oil prices continued to climb on Monday as geopolitical tensions in the Middle East intensified following strong warnings from former U.S. President Donald Trump directed at Iran. The Wall Street Jour...

item.title: Oil and diesel prices rise amid Middle East tensions and Trump’s warnings
item.description: Oil and diesel prices surged on Monday amid escalating tensions in the Middle East following a series of warnings from former US President Donald Trump. Brent Crude futures for May climbed 2.1 per cen...

item.title: Senator Adeseun Steps Down as Mayegun Citing Conflicts with Ogbomosoland Monarch
item.description: Senator Hamzat Ayoade Adeseun don officially resign from him title as Mayegun of Ogbomosoland following suspension wey Soun of Ogbomosoland, Oba Ghandi Afolabi Olaoye, don give am over alleged disresp...

item.title: Ana Paula Maia's 'On Earth As It Is Beneath' Explores Brutality and Human Survival in Penal Colonies
item.description: Ana Paula Maia's novel, 'On Earth As It Is Beneath', first published in 2017 in Portuguese and translated by Padma Viswanathan, has been shortlisted for the 2026 International Booker Prize. The work, ...

item.title: Pioneering Nigerians Who Studied Abroad and Influenced the Nation Before Independence
item.description: Before Nigeria even get her own universities, small group of Nigerians waka go abroad to study and bring back knowledge wey dem use shape di country. For 1611, Prince Olu Atuwatse I from Warri Kingdom...

item.title: Government Plans Massive Expansion to Accommodate Double Cohort of Secondary Students
item.description: Tanzania is getting ready for a historic change in its education system, with Sh1 trillion set aside to manage the expected surge of over three million students joining secondary school in 2028 under ...

item.title: LSK boss urges police to release Kisumu blogger arrested after MP’s complaint
item.description: The Law Society of Kenya (LSK) president-elect, Charles Kanjama, has demanded the release of Kisumu-based blogger Vincent Odhiambo Opiyo, who was arrested by officers from the Directorate of Criminal ...
